pr.title: Record: 0.0214 bpb - Low Eval-Time Memory Regime: Packed Training N-gram Artifact + Learned Gate (No Phrase Cache)

output.summary: Packed training-derived order-2..9 n-gram cache lives in the artifact and a learned gate blends neural+ngram experts without the logistic mixer or phrase cache.
techniques: Packed order-2..9 training n-gram cache stored in artifact
Learned gate blending neural model with n-gram experts
Eliminated logistic mixer and long phrase cache for lean causal eval
